_label: DEVELOPMENT-ONLY fixtures for Phase 9 hybrid extraction; never benchmark evidence

durable_positives.message: My daughter's soccer practice moved to Thursday.
My son goes to Lincoln Middle School.
We moved to Seattle last spring.
I use a Pixel 9 for everything these days.
For long international trips, I usually go with a window seat.
Use Celsius whenever you give me weather.
I changed jobs and now work for Globex.
I work for Globex now. I speak Spanish and Portuguese.

non_durable_negatives.message: For this answer only, use a table.
Maybe I'll move to Seattle someday.
My friend said, 'I work for Globex.'
Ugh, I'm so tired right now.
For this role-play, pretend I speak Klingon.
non_durable_negatives.note: screens the auxiliary path; v1 rule behavior itself is frozen and unscreened
